createDispute(uint256,bytes).details: Create a dispute and pay arbitration fees

params._choices: Number of ruling options (2 for approve/reject)

returns.disputeID: The ID of the created dispute

currentRuling(uint256).details: Get the current ruling for a dispute

returns.ruling: The current ruling (0 = no ruling, 1 = approve, 2 = reject)
